scenarios.name: Batch logo generation with Flux Schnell on fal.ai
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses a default model with wasteful step counts; treatment picks fal-ai/flux/schnell with num_inference_steps=4 (its distilled sweet spot) via fal_client.subscribe.

scenarios.name: Black Forest Labs direct API with polling
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents a wrong endpoint and Bearer auth; treatment POSTs to api.bfl.ml/v1/flux-pro-1.1 with x-key, polls get_result, handles Error/Content Moderated, then downloads result.sample.
